head.text: Anxious and depressed, confused. Vertigo; must close eyes. Head heavy. Noises in ears

stomach_abdomen.text: Nausea, vomiting. Pain in pit of stomach and abdomen. Severe purging

extremities.text: Gait unsteady. Trembling of all limbs. Loss of power in extremities. Violent pain in calves, as if bound with cords. Cold extremities. Spasmodic motions of arms and legs. Cannot write; cannot hold a glass of water. Trembling of hands in paralysis

keynotes.text: color="#800000">LOLEUM TEMULENTUM Darnel (LOLIUM TUMULENTUM) Has been made use of in cephalalgia, sciatica, paralysis. Prostration and restlessness.
